metadata.description: Azure region for all resources
Location for PostgreSQL Flexible Server (some subscriptions are restricted in westeurope).
Prefix used for Azure resource names. Use only lowercase letters and digits.
Container image to deploy in Azure Container Apps, for example myregistry.azurecr.io/naas:latest
CPU cores allocated to the container app
Memory allocated to the container app
Minimum number of replicas for the container app
Maximum number of replicas for the container app
Enable zone redundancy for Container Apps managed environment (requires infrastructure subnet)
Region for the Static Web App. SWA SKUs only available in a subset of regions.
SKU for the Static Web App
Controls whether the Static Web App resource is deployed by this template.
Controls whether Application Insights is deployed.
Controls whether Application Gateway WAF is deployed in front of the API.
Enable IP restriction for /docs and /openapi/v1.json at WAF level.
Allowed CIDRs for /docs and /openapi/v1.json when restriction is enabled.
Administrator login for the PostgreSQL Flexible Server
Administrator password for the PostgreSQL Flexible Server. Provide via secure parameter.
JWT signing key used to sign authentication tokens. Use a long random value.
Database name to create on the PostgreSQL server
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for CAE diagnostics.
Name of the blob container to create
Principal ID of the identity that will be granted Storage Blob Data Contributor
Name of the PostgreSQL Flexible Server
Region for the server
Tags
Administrator login name
Administrator login password (use a secure parameter / Key Vault reference)
Database name to create on the server
SKU name (Burstable cheapest)
SKU tier
PostgreSQL major version
Storage in GB
Npgsql connection string. Marked secure so it is not echoed in deployment outputs.
Key Vault name (must be globally unique, 3-24 chars, alphanumeric + dashes)
Region
Tags
Principal ID (object ID) granted the Key Vault Secrets User role on this vault. Typically the User-Assigned Managed Identity used by the Container App.
Secrets to seed into the vault. Each item: { name: string, value: string }
Environment variables to inject into the container
Container App secrets. Each item is either { name, value } or { name, keyVaultUrl, identity } for Key Vault references.
Allowed source CIDRs for /docs and /openapi/v1.json access. Empty array blocks docs for everyone.
Enable IP restriction on /docs and /openapi/v1.json paths.

customRules.name: block-docs-from-non-allowlist
customRules.matchConditions: [concat(createArray(createObject('matchVariables', createArray(createObject('variableName', 'RequestUri')), 'operator', 'Regex', 'negationCondition', false(), 'matchValues', createArray('^/(docs|openapi/v1\.json)(/.*)?$'), 'transforms', createArray('Lowercase'))), if(empty(parameters('docsAllowedCidrs')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('matchVariables', createArray(createObject('variableName', 'RemoteAddr')), 'operator', 'IPMatch', 'negationCondition', true(), 'matchValues', parameters('docsAllowedCidrs'), 'transforms', createArray()))))]

metadata.description: Name of the Static Web App resource
Region for the Static Web App. Note: SWA SKUs are available only in a subset of regions.
Tags to apply
SKU for the Static Web App
Backend URL the SPA will call (e.g. https://my-api.azurecontainerapps.io)
